moyoaji: I guess I can give you some of the things I noticed: Move 9 should generally be at J17 or H16. Move 53 seems too slow. there are larger points on the board like P13, E11, F15, and others that border our two territories. I'm not sure about the sequence from 55 to 61. It perseveres your points on the top, but lets me get a ponnuki toward the center, partly nullifying your wall at K5. Perhaps you could play H15 or M15, or even K15 for move 55 instead. As you saw when I played 62, those points were hard to keep and you ended up losing half of them. Playing for central influence would be consistent with your wall on the bottom. I'm ahead in territory, so you need to find a way to make more than just a few points. Move 67 was too passive. If you're going to play there, it has to be at F16 - keep me disconnnected from my corner. You can't let me connect easily. Move 69 is okay, and can give you something in the center. It would be a much stronger move if you'd also disconnected my ponnuki as that influence could be used to attack me, but it could still build you something. Instead, move 75 asks for too much and I get to take away everything. I felt that was the point where the game was lost. I now have too much central influence for you to build anything substantial and you don't have enough territory now that my right side was solidified.
